securityTab.intro: Controls the platform security posture. High (zero-trust) mode is impactful — read the warning before enabling.
securityTab.highWarning: The pgwire server will not start, and REST & GraphQL data endpoints will return 403. Only clients that decrypt locally (kms_key_arn configured) can reach data. Verify your clients are configured before enabling.
securityTab.savedRestartRequired: Saved. Restart the service to apply.
